stemHtml: Prior to commencing a low visibility approach, the commander of the flight must be satisfied that…

options.a: there will be no aircraft movement in the aerodrome manoeuvering area until the landing is complete, according to information received from Air Traffic Services (ATS).
options.b: the fuel on board upon landing shall not be less than the fuel required to fly to the Destination Alternate plus the Final Reserve.
options.c: at least one flight crew member is properly qualified for the low visibility approach.
options.d: appropriate Low Visibility Procedures(LVPs) are in force, according to information received from Air Traffic Services (ATS).
